**Welcome to the Online Employment Center for the County of Santa Cruz**

* * *

**Mission Statement**

**In collaboration with our customers, we will recruit, develop, support, and retain an ethical, professional and diverse workforce dedicated to serving the community**

* * *

**Upcoming Community Workshops**

**Community Room (Basement)**

**701 Ocean St.,** **Santa Cruz, CA 95060**

**County of Santa Cruz employees make a difference**

**Click [here](https://www.santacruzcountyca.gov/VisionSantaCruz/communityresults.aspx) to learn more about the amazing work we do**

* * *

**The County of Santa Cruz is an Equal Opportunity Employer and values diversity in its workforce. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected category under federal, state, or local law. If you require accommodation in the recruitment process due to a disability, please contact us at** **(831) 454-2600.**![](h:\Trades&Construction%20Career%20Expo%20Flyer.png)
